info.title: Address Party Domain Schemas
info.description:
Shared domain schemas for address and addressable party information.

**Address** represents a physical location using ISO 19160-compliant fields:
```yaml
address1: "1600 Pennsylvania Avenue NW"
locality: "Washington"
administrativeArea: "DC"
postalCode: "20500"
country: "US"
```

**AddressableParty** represents a named contact — with a nested Address:
```yaml
firstName: "William"
lastName: "Shakespeare"
email: "will@example.com"
address:            # ← nested Address
  address1: "Rose Cottage, Henley Street"
  locality: "Stratford-upon-Avon"
  postalCode: "CV37 6QW"
  country: "GB"
```

**CompanyContext** provides optional business context for commercial deliveries:
```yaml
company:
  name: "Acme Wine Merchants Ltd"
  department: "Purchasing Department"
```

In short: an Address is *where*; an AddressableParty is *who* lives or works there;
a CompanyContext is *which business* they represent (if any).

These schemas are referenced by Cart, Checkout, Order, and Payments APIs to ensure
consistency across the Direct Wines commerce platform.

license.name: Direct Wines Proprietary
license.x-notice: This specification and all related materials are the exclusive property of Direct Wines and may not be used, copied, or distributed without explicit permission.

Address.description:
ISO 19160-compliant address structure for international commerce.

**Required fields:** address1, locality, postalCode, country

**Market-specific guidance:**
- **UK**: administrativeArea (county) is optional; locality is town/city
- **US**: administrativeArea (state) is expected; use 2-letter state codes (CA, NY, TX)
- **AU**: administrativeArea (state) is expected; locality represents suburb

**Examples by market:**

UK Urban Address:
```yaml
address1: "10 Downing Street"
locality: "London"
administrativeArea: "Greater London"
postalCode: "SW1A 2AA"
country: "GB"
```

UK Rural Address:
```yaml
address1: "Rose Cottage, Henley Street"
locality: "Stratford-upon-Avon"
administrativeArea: "Warwickshire"
postalCode: "CV37 6QW"
country: "GB"
```

US Urban Address with Unit:
```yaml
address1: "456 Oak Avenue"
address2: "Apt 3B"
locality: "San Francisco"
administrativeArea: "CA"
postalCode: "94102"
country: "US"
```

US Standard Address:
```yaml
address1: "1 Market Street"
locality: "New York"
administrativeArea: "NY"
postalCode: "10013"
country: "US"
```

AU Suburban Address:
```yaml
address1: "1 Macquarie Street"
locality: "Sydney"
administrativeArea: "NSW"
postalCode: "2000"
country: "AU"
```

AU Address with Unit:
```yaml
address1: "123 Collins Street"
address2: "Level 5"
locality: "Melbourne"
administrativeArea: "VIC"
postalCode: "3000"
country: "AU"
```

These examples demonstrate the proper use of ISO 19160 fields across Direct Wines' key markets.

address2.description: Secondary address line for apartment, suite, unit, floor, or building details (optional).

locality.description:
City or locality (ISO 19160 terminology).
UK: Town or city (e.g., "London", "Manchester", "Stratford-upon-Avon").
US: City (e.g., "San Francisco", "New York", "Boston").
AU: Suburb (e.g., "Sydney", "Melbourne", "Brisbane").

administrativeArea.description:
State, province, county, or region (ISO 19160 administrativeArea).

UK: Optional county or region (e.g., "Greater London", "Warwickshire", "Yorkshire").
US: 2-letter state code, expected for US addresses (e.g., "CA", "NY", "TX").
AU: State/territory code, expected for AU addresses (e.g., "NSW", "VIC", "QLD", "WA").

postalCode.description:
Postal or ZIP code.
UK: Alphanumeric format (e.g., "SW1A 1AA", "CV37 6QW").
US: 5-digit ZIP or ZIP+4 format (e.g., "94102", "10013-1234").
AU: 4-digit postcode (e.g., "2000", "3000", "4000").

country.description:
Two-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code.
Examples: "GB" (United Kingdom), "US" (United States), "AU" (Australia).

AddressableParty.description:
Contact information for an addressable party (billing, shipping, etc.) with nested ISO 19160-compliant address.
At least one contact method (email or phone) must be provided.
The `address` property: Nested address following ISO 19160 standard.

The optional `company` property provides business context following ISO 19160-4 organization
identification patterns. Its presence indicates a commercial delivery rather than residential.
Maps to commercetools BaseAddress fields: `company`, `department`.

**Example - UK Residential Customer:**
```yaml
title: "Mr"
firstName: "William"
lastName: "Shakespeare"
email: "will@example.com"
phone: "+44 1789 204016"
address:
  address1: "Rose Cottage, Henley Street"
  locality: "Stratford-upon-Avon"
  administrativeArea: "Warwickshire"
  postalCode: "CV37 6QW"
  country: "GB"
```

**Example - US Residential Customer:**
```yaml
firstName: "Jane"
lastName: "Smith"
email: "jane@example.com"
phone: "+1 415 555 0100"
address:
  address1: "456 Oak Avenue"
  address2: "Apt 3B"
  locality: "San Francisco"
  administrativeArea: "CA"
  postalCode: "94102"
  country: "US"
```

**Example - AU Residential Customer:**
```yaml
firstName: "John"
lastName: "Smith"
email: "john.smith@example.com"
phone: "+61 2 9374 4000"
address:
  address1: "123 Collins Street"
  address2: "Level 5"
  locality: "Melbourne"
  administrativeArea: "VIC"
  postalCode: "3000"
  country: "AU"
```

**Example - UK Business Delivery:**
```yaml
firstName: "Sarah"
lastName: "Johnson"
email: "sarah.johnson@acmewines.co.uk"
phone: "+44 20 7946 0958"
company:
  name: "Acme Wine Merchants Ltd"
  department: "Purchasing Department"
address:
  address1: "100 Liverpool Street"
  address2: "Floor 3"
  locality: "London"
  administrativeArea: "Greater London"
  postalCode: "EC2M 2RH"
  country: "GB"
```

**Example - US Corporate Gift Delivery:**
```yaml
firstName: "Michael"
lastName: "Chen"
email: "m.chen@example.com"
company:
  name: "TechCorp Inc"
address:
  address1: "350 Fifth Avenue"
  address2: "Suite 3300"
  locality: "New York"
  administrativeArea: "NY"
  postalCode: "10118"
  country: "US"
```

**Example - AU Wine Club Office Delivery:**
```yaml
firstName: "Emily"
lastName: "Watson"
phone: "+61 3 9000 1234"
company:
  name: "Melbourne Wine Collective"
  department: "Events Team"
address:
  address1: "200 Collins Street"
  address2: "Level 12"
  locality: "Melbourne"
  administrativeArea: "VIC"
  postalCode: "3000"
  country: "AU"
```

These examples show residential and commercial addressable party information for Direct Wines' key markets.

title.description:
Customer's title or honorific (e.g., Mr, Mrs, Ms, Dr, Prof, Sir, Dame).

This optional field enables merchants to address customers formally in communications such as letters, emails, and marketing materials.

Not required for payment processing or delivery.

email.description: Customer email address (required if phone not provided).

phone.description: Customer phone number (required if email not provided).

CompanyContext.description:
Company context for business addresses, following ISO 19160-4
organization identification patterns. When present on an AddressableParty,
indicates the delivery is to a business rather than a private residence.
Maps to commercetools BaseAddress fields: company, department.

name.description:
Company or business name for commercial deliveries,
corporate gifting, and business address identification.

department.description:
Department or division within the company to help
route deliveries within larger businesses or office buildings.
